subtitles.bunker.aptechki: At the entrance: first-aid kits, rubber gloves, masks, and a fire extinguisher.
subtitles.bunker.video-so-sputnika: Satellite footage — beautiful and oddly calming.
subtitles.bunker.vmeste-na-10-let: The bunker will only open in 10 years.
subtitles.bunker.golosovoe-upravlenie: The bunker is controlled by an AI with a voice interface.
subtitles.bunker.grechka: A whole lot of buckwheat — double supplies.
subtitles.bunker.dinamo-mashina: A hand-powered dynamo generator for producing energy.
subtitles.bunker.zhertvennik: There is an altar in the bunker — ominous and unsettling.
subtitles.bunker.zagadochnyy-zhurnal: A strange journal listing the names of everyone in your group.
subtitles.bunker.zapisi-kontrabandista: A smuggler's notes: every hidden cache is described in detail.
subtitles.bunker.instruktsiya-k-mikrovolnovke: There is no toilet paper in the bunker.
subtitles.bunker.katakomby: The basement has an exit into a grotto with an underground river.
subtitles.bunker.kerosinovye-lampy: Electricity is unreliable, but there are kerosene lamps.
subtitles.bunker.kniga-o-ede: A cookbook: “On Tasty and Healthy Food.”
subtitles.bunker.kofe: A coffee grinder and a stash of fragrant whole-bean coffee.
subtitles.bunker.krysy: Looks like rats have infested the bunker.
subtitles.bunker.masterskaya: The bunker has a workshop with tools and spare parts.
subtitles.bunker.mediateka: The media library contains only adult films.
subtitles.bunker.musor: Abandoned construction debris was left in the bunker.
subtitles.bunker.podval: The bunker was built by prisoners.
subtitles.bunker.radio: Classical music plays over the internal radio.
subtitles.bunker.silovoe-pole: The bunker is protected by a force field — almost impossible to breach from outside.
subtitles.bunker.uklon-45: The bunker entrance is built at a 45° incline — climbing in or out is much harder.
subtitles.bunker.uchebnik: A training manual: “How to Convince a Zombie Not to Eat Your Brain.”
subtitles.bunker.him-laboratoriya: You could set up a hydroponic farm here.
subtitles.bunker.shkaf-s-nastolkami: A cabinet full of board games.
